title: Create status endpoint
input: create a GET /api/v1/status endpoint that returns JSON { status: 'ok', version: '1.0.0', uptime: <seconds> }. no authentication required.

requiredConstraints: create a GET /api/v1/status endpoint that returns JSON { status: 'ok', version: '1.0.0', uptime: <seconds> }. no authentication required.
forbiddenAdditions: Do not add authentication, pagination, or filtering not requested while addressing “Create status endpoint”.
